name: McMenamins Kennedy School
heroSub: A private film screening and complimentary dinner at McMenamins Kennedy School.
aboutHeadline:
This is not a seminar.
It's a private premiere.
about: You've been personally invited to an exclusive screening of Retirement Everest.
The evening takes place in the Martha Jordan Room — film and dinner in one historic classroom.

expect.title: Arrive & Be Welcomed
expect.desc: Doors open 15 minutes before showtime in the Martha Jordan Room.

expect.title: Watch the Film
expect.desc: Retirement Everest screens in a beautifully restored school setting.

expect.title: Dinner & Conversation
expect.desc: Courtyard Restaurant fare served at your table after the screening.

formTitle: Reserve Your Seat at the Table
formIntro: Dinner is included — select your meal below.
formNote: Arrival bite at your table; main and drink served after the film.
footer: Retirement Everest · Private Screening Series · McMenamins Kennedy School · Portland, OR

starters.name: Hummus
starters.desc: Marinated olives, veggies, feta, pita bread

mains.name: Jamaican Rice Bowl
mains.desc: Coconut curry, black beans, avocado, mango chutney, cilantro

mains.name: El Diablo Chicken Sandwich
mains.desc: Spiced chicken, pepper jack, avocado, Dark Star mayo
